description_long: This object is a stack of two thick, fluffy pancakes with a golden-brown surface, topped with a small square of butter at the center. A generous amount of glossy, amber-colored syrup is poured over the top pancake, cascading down the sides and pooling slightly at the base. The pancakes have a slightly uneven, realistic texture with visible air pockets and a soft, spongy appearance. The butter pat is pale yellow and slightly sunken into the warm pancake, suggesting it is beginning to melt. The syrup appears viscous and reflective, enhancing the appetizing look of the stack. There is no visible plate or serving surface beneath the pancakes, and no additional garnishes are present.
description: A stack of two golden-brown pancakes topped with a pat of butter and drizzled with glossy syrup, with no plate or garnish visible.
description_view_0: Front view shows the butter pat and syrup flowing down the left side, with the syrup pooling at the base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the syrup running off the left edge and the butter pat slightly off-center.
description_view_2: The butter pat is centered, and the syrup is mostly contained on top, with less visible dripping.
description_view_3: Syrup is seen running down the right side, with the butter pat still visible and syrup pooling at the base.
